notes: Pipeline reliability + accuracy: heavy/scanned-document AI pacing for smoother large-file remediation, the audit no longer stops early, reading-order-safe restyle + heading transforms, more honest conformance reporting, and the auto-remediation completion target raised to 95. Also adds a STEM coordinate-grid tool, expanded translations (numberline + coordgrid across 50+ languages), and Geology Explorer deep-earth + first-person upgrades.
Initial release for King Middle pilot. Stable bookmark URL: apomera.github.io/AlloFlow/launch.html
